# VULK Agent Skills
# https://vulk.dev/skills
#
# These skills teach AI coding agents how to generate professional,
# production-grade code. Based on the Agent Skills specification
# (https://agentskills.io) and inspired by GSAP's skills pattern
# (https://github.com/greensock/gsap-skills).
#
# Each skill is a focused instruction set for a specific domain.
# Skills are loaded dynamically based on the project type and prompt.

## Skills Index

### vulk-design-system
- Path: skills/design-system/SKILL.md
- Description: Core design principles for professional, premium web applications
- Triggers: design, premium, professional, modern, elegant, beautiful, stunning
- Always loaded: yes

### vulk-react-patterns
- Path: skills/react-patterns/SKILL.md
- Description: Correct React patterns for generated code
- Triggers: react, component, hook, state, jsx
- Always loaded: yes (for React projects)

### vulk-tailwind
- Path: skills/tailwind/SKILL.md
- Description: Correct Tailwind CSS usage patterns including responsive design
- Triggers: tailwind, css, style, responsive, dark mode
- Always loaded: yes

### vulk-animations
- Path: skills/animations/SKILL.md
- Description: Professional animation patterns using Framer Motion and CSS
- Triggers: animation, animate, motion, transition, scroll, reveal, parallax, gsap, framer
- Always loaded: yes (for web projects)

### vulk-gsap
- Path: skills/gsap/SKILL.md
- Description: Official GSAP patterns — core API, ScrollTrigger, timelines, React integration
- Triggers: gsap, greensock, scrolltrigger, scroll animation, parallax, pin, scrub, timeline animation, scroll-driven, scroll reveal, advanced animation
- Always loaded: no

### vulk-backend
- Path: skills/backend/SKILL.md
- Description: PostgreSQL schema, auth patterns, API design for full-stack generation
- Triggers: backend, database, auth, login, register, api, postgresql, sql, crud, admin, dashboard
- Always loaded: no

### vulk-layouts
- Path: skills/layouts/SKILL.md
- Description: Professional page layouts and section patterns for landing pages
- Triggers: landing, website, page, hero, section, footer, header, navbar, layout, corporate, portfolio, saas
- Always loaded: no

### vulk-typography
- Path: skills/typography/SKILL.md
- Description: Professional font pairing and typography rules
- Triggers: font, typography, heading, serif, sans-serif, premium, elegant, corporate, luxury
- Always loaded: no

### vulk-accessibility
- Path: skills/accessibility/SKILL.md
- Description: Accessibility and semantic HTML patterns
- Triggers: accessible, a11y, aria, semantic, screen reader, keyboard
- Always loaded: no

## Usage

Skills are automatically loaded by the VULK agent based on prompt analysis.
Core skills (design-system, react-patterns, tailwind) are always included.
Optional skills are scored against the user's prompt and the top 4 matches
are injected into the system prompt.

To use these skills in your own AI agent:
1. Read the SKILL.md files relevant to your project
2. Inject the content into your system prompt
3. The AI will follow the patterns described in each skill
